betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Nuclear Blast Furnace§f uses nuclear heat for ultra-high-temperature smelting.

§eCapabilities:§f
• Much higher temperatures than electric arc
• Can process materials other furnaces cannot
• Essential for certain exotic materials

§eOperation:§f
• Requires nuclear fuel
• Emits radiation during operation
• Handle output carefully

§aTip:§f Use for materials requiring extreme heat processing.
